summary: Workflow changes add a finalize-merge job and durable artifactRef metadata so dashboard links continue working after merge; permissions and transitions were reviewed against the workflow-safety checklist and supporting tests cover the new path.

requirement_checks.requirement: Open PR retains head-branch dashboard links
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: renderPrBody retains head-branch blob links when artifactRef is null
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: buildArtifactLinks falls back to branch when artifactRef is absent

requirement_checks.requirement: Merged PR rewrites artifact links to the base branch
evidence: .github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: finalize-merged-pr job forwards FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF to apply-pr-state
scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs: applyArtifactRef persists the base branch ref in metadata
tests/route-pr-loop.test.mjs: merged PR events produce finalize_merge with base branch

requirement_checks.requirement: Durable artifact ref persists across subsequent metadata updates
evidence: scripts/lib/pr-metadata-shape.mjs: artifactRef included in defaultPrMetadata and canonicalization
tests/pr-metadata.test.mjs: canonicalizePrMetadata normalizes artifactRef and preserves value

requirement_checks.requirement: Factory PR Loop finalizes merged PRs automatically
evidence: .github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: finalize-merged-pr job gated on route action finalize_merge
tests/route-pr-loop.test.mjs: finalize_merge routed for merged PRs with factory metadata

requirement_checks.requirement: Extend PR metadata shape with artifactRef and canonicalize it
evidence: scripts/lib/pr-metadata-shape.mjs: normalizeArtifactRef trims and nulls empty values
scripts/lib/pr-metadata.mjs: renderPrBody threads artifactRef into rendered metadata

requirement_checks.requirement: apply-pr-state supports FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF and applyArtifactRef helper
evidence: scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs: applyArtifactRef helper updates metadata and canonicalization
tests/apply-pr-state-metadata.test.mjs: unit tests cover applyArtifactRef semantics

requirement_checks.requirement: Update rendering to prefer artifactRef when present
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: buildArtifactLinks uses artifactRef when provided
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: renderPrBody uses artifactRef override for dashboard links

checklist.residual_risks: No additional residual workflow risks identified.
